title: Fix continuous UI flicker caused by silent React Query refetch/state loop (logged-in)

requirements.text: Stop the continuous UI blinking/lag by eliminating any silent React Query invalidation/refetch loop that happens while authenticated (Internet Identity). Ensure that actor/identity initialization does not repeatedly invalidate and refetch all non-actor queries on an ongoing basis.

quotes: nå ser jeg porteföljen og alt er der, men siden blinker/lagger. virker som den blinker mellom default priser og pröver å oppdatere riser uten at den klarer det...

acceptanceCriteria: When logged in via Internet Identity, the dashboard no longer continuously flickers between default/fallback values and live values.
React Query Devtools/logs (or console logs already present in hooks) do not show repeated invalidation/refetch cycles happening continuously without user action.
Queries refetch only at their intended cadence (e.g., prices/FX at configured intervals) and not in a tight loop triggered by actor/identity changes.

requirements.text: Make the portfolio rendering stable during background updates: while live prices and FX rates are refetching, keep displaying the last known successful portfolio computation instead of swapping back to fallback/default values mid-session.

quotes: virker som den blinker mellom default priser og pröver å oppdatere riser uten at den klarer det...
Jeg bygger en konkret løsning som stopper den kontinuerlige refetch-/state-loopen ...

acceptanceCriteria: During any background refetch of prices and/or exchange rate, the totals and asset rows do not visibly alternate between two different states (no oscillation).
If a live fetch fails, the UI continues to show the last known successful live/cached values (or a single consistent fallback), rather than rapidly switching back and forth.
The UI still updates to new live values when a subsequent fetch succeeds, without causing visible flicker.

requirements.text: Add lightweight diagnostics to verify the fix: log (or otherwise surface) a single, clearly identifiable reason whenever portfolio-related queries are invalidated/refetched due to authentication/actor changes, and ensure this does not spam continuously in normal operation.

quotes: Dette peker veldig tydelig på en stille refetch-/state-loop i frontend
Stoppe uendelige refetch-loops (stabile query keys + riktig `enabled`/`staleTime`)

acceptanceCriteria: After page load, diagnostics indicate at most one portfolio-query invalidation/refetch caused by the actor becoming ready (not repeated continuously).
No new user-facing error banners are introduced as part of the diagnostics.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose existing UI components instead).
Do not modify immutable frontend hook paths listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
nonGoals: Do not add new portfolio features or change portfolio calculations beyond what is necessary to remove flicker.
Do not change backend logic or schemas unless the flicker cannot be fixed purely in the frontend.
